specific_question: How often are sales performance reviews conducted in the sales department of Elexion Automotive?
answer: Amanda successfully launched structured quarterly performance reviews for all sales team members starting in January 2024. In the initial review, 85% of team members scoring 50points or higher out of 100 possible points.
